changeList: 2.1.218-1-f104614: PR #127 - Normalize HTML-encoded and percent-encoded tracking params in queue/history URLs (https://github.com/Laziassdev/ripme/pull/127) — ### Motivation - Links copied from HTML or other sources could include encoded ampersands (`&`) or percent-encoded query keys which prevented the app from stripping tracking parameters, causing tracking params to app
